headline: Stronger Guidance And Bayer Tech Tie-Up Might Change The Case For Investing In Deere (DE)
summary: In late February 2026, Deere & Company reported first-quarter revenue of US$9,611 million and net income of US$656 million, raised its full-year 2026 earnings guidance to a range of US$4.5 billion to US$5.0 billion, declared a quarterly dividend of US$1.62 per share, and announced the results of its annual shareholder meeting where several shareholder proposals were not approved. Deere also highlighted its push into connected, data-driven farming through an integration between Bayer’s...
